title: White Cross
body: Solve the white cross on the bottom. Match each white edge to its center, then insert. No algorithm needed yet—focus on intuition.

title: First Two Layers (F2L)
body: Pair corner and edge pieces and insert them into the correct slots. Example: R U R' U' inserts a pair. Practice look-ahead to reduce pauses.

title: OLL - Orient Last Layer
body: Make the top face one color. Beginners can use the 2-look method: first orient edges (e.g. F R U R' U' F'), then corners. Algorithm example: R U2 R' U' R U' R' (for one case).

title: PLL - Permute Last Layer
body: Position the last-layer pieces correctly. Common algs: Ua perm R U' R U R U R U' R' U' R2, Ub perm R2 U R U R' U' R' U' R' U R'. After this, the cube is solved!
